title: metathelypteris hattorii var. nemoralis
intro: Metathelypteris hattorii var. nemoralis, also known as a type of fern plant, is a species of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional East Asian medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Metathelypteris hattorii var. nemoralis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or decoction for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a treatment for various health conditions.
